name: Patelco Credit Union San Francisco - Main
description_short: Patelco Credit Union's San Francisco Downtown branch offers full-service banking including checking, savings, loans, mortgages, and investment services to credit union members.
description_long:
Patelco Credit Union is a federally chartered credit union serving the San Francisco Bay Area with a primary downtown location at 124 2nd Street. The organization operates as a member-owned cooperative financial institution with routing number 321076470, providing comprehensive retail banking services to its membership base.

The San Francisco Main branch offers a complete suite of consumer and mortgage banking products. Members can access checking accounts (Plus, Free, Interest-bearing, and Student options), savings accounts (Regular, Money Market Plus/Select, Kids Savings), certificates of deposit, IRA and HSA accounts, credit cards (Low Rate, Rewards, and Secured variants), personal loans with debt consolidation options, home purchase and refinance mortgages, home equity lines of credit and equity loans, auto loans, and recreational vehicle financing. The branch also provides investment advisory services through certified financial specialists and insurance products including vehicle, life, and payment protection coverage.

The branch distinguishes itself through personalized service from named staff members including a branch manager, home loan consultant (Yolanda Ortiz Velazquez, NMLS #1743035, with 10+ years mortgage experience and Spanish language fluency), and a financial advisor (Kristian Pavlov, CA Insurance License 0M07077). The facility features accessibility accommodations and convenient downtown amenities including free WiFi, complimentary coffee and tea, proximity to public transit (BART and bus stops), and an on-site ATM.

As a credit union rather than a traditional bank, Patelco members benefit from member-owned governance and cooperative principles, though membership eligibility requirements apply. The downtown location operates limited hours (10am-5pm weekdays only, closed weekends), which may not suit customers needing extended availability. Online and mobile banking options partially offset branch hour limitations. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Full-service credit union with comprehensive product offerings including checking, savings, mortgages, auto loans, and investment services
Spanish-speaking mortgage consultant (Yolanda Ortiz Velazquez) with 10+ years industry experience
On-site certified financial advisor (Kristian Pavlov) for estate planning and personalized financial guidance
Member-owned cooperative structure typically offering competitive rates and lower fees than traditional banks
Downtown San Francisco location with wheelchair accessibility, free WiFi, and proximity to BART/bus transit
Multiple account types including student checking, kids savings, money market accounts, and IRA/HSA options
Home equity lending products including ADU (Accessory Dwelling Unit) HELOC for California property owners
cons: Limited branch hours (10am-5pm weekdays only; closed Saturdays, Sundays) serve downtown workers but not evening/weekend banking customers
Single downtown location limits physical accessibility for San Francisco residents outside financial district
Credit union membership requires meeting eligibility requirements; not open to all consumers like traditional banks
Website does not disclose specific APR ranges, loan terms, or rate competitiveness for major products
No mention of 24/7 customer service phone support or extended digital banking hours to compensate for limited branch hours
best_for: San Francisco financial district workers seeking convenient downtown branch access during business hours
Spanish-speaking homebuyers in the Bay Area prioritizing bilingual mortgage guidance
Credit union members seeking comprehensive banking, lending, and investment services in one institution
California homeowners exploring home equity financing options including ADU financing
diagnosis: Patelco's San Francisco Main branch is best for credit union members in the financial district seeking full-service banking with personalized mortgage and financial advisory services. The primary caveat is limited branch hours (weekdays 10am-5pm only) and single downtown location, requiring customers outside the financial district or needing evening/weekend service to rely on digital banking.
services: Savings accounts (Regular, Money Market Plus, Money Market Select, Kids Savings)
Certificates of deposit and IRA accounts
Credit cards (Low Rate, Rewards, Secured, Student)
Personal loans and debt consolidation loans
Home equity lines of credit (HELOC) and equity loans
Auto loans and recreational vehicle financing (RVs, boats, motorcycles)
Investment advisory and financial planning services
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
